traits.t: Spiky Bod: deals chip damage to the opponent upon a successful Super Block of a strike.

pros.p: High damage from both single hits and combos.
Strong throw presence with comboable throws and a devastating command grab.

flows.f: Uncharged S always inflicts crumple (shorter than full charge).
Less time required for charged q.

normals.name: {{ n5 }}{{ B }}
normals.description: Kabbu steps forward with a backfist.

normals.name: {{ n5 }}{{ C }}
normals.description:
Kabbu slashes his horn inwards.
Charged version pulls the opponent in and is plus on block.

normals.name: {{ n2 }}{{ B }}
normals.description: Crouching kick. Moves Kabbu forwards slightly.

normals.name: {{ j }}{{ C }}
normals.description:
Slashes horn upwards.
Charged version floats Kabbu upwards a little.

commands.name: {{ n6 }}{{ A }}
commands.description:
Advances forward with a kick. Doesn't chain into any other normals.
Always plus on block, but hitting it later will make it more plus (of course).
Retracts hurtbox near the feet, so sometimes it can go over low-aimed attacks.
Tumbles on counter hit.

commands.name: {{ n3 }}{{ C }}
commands.description:
Kabbu steps forward and uses his horn to lift the opponent up and towards himself.
The startup is slow, so its use in combos is restricted to crouching opponents or juggles.
You can use it to restart block pressure since it's plus on block and pulls the opponent in.
Can also be used as an anti-air due to the angle it covers, but it is a little slow.

commands.name: {{ n4 }}{{ C }}
commands.description:
Kabbu does an uppercut to the gut.
If the initial connect whiffs, he'll continue to uppercut, which makes it a decent anti-air.
Plus on block.

commands.name: {{ d }}{{ C }}
commands.description:
Kabbu handsprings forward with a kick.
Upper-body invincible and cancelable into air specials.

throws.name: Ground throw
throws.description: Kabbu shoulder checks the opponent, crumpling them.

throws.name: Air throw
throws.input: {{ d4 }}{{ A }}+{{ D }} or {{ d6 }}{{ A }}+{{ D }} while airborne
throws.description:
Kabbu catches the opponent on his horn and slings them away.
Unlike other throws, you can actually combo after this one for free when used mid-combo.

skills.name: {{ n5 }}{{ S }}
skills.description:
Kabbu braces himself, then slashes forward with his horn when you release {{ S }}.
Has one hit of guard point during the charging portion only. At full charge, the guard point persists even during the attack.
You can dash cancel either during the charge or once the attack connects.

skills.name: Taunt
skills.description:
Kabbu taunts the opponent. If the opponent hits him within a certain time, Kabbu catches the attack with his horn and counters.
The counterattack knocks the opponent up and behind Kabbu, allowing you to get a followup combo.

skills.name: Horn Dash
skills.description:
Kabbu does a short shoulder tackle forwards. You can press {{ d6 }}{{ A }} to do a larger horn dash afterwards that knocks down. It's super unsafe, but Critical Counters on counterhit.
If you space the first tackle, it can be plus.
In the air, Kabbu only does a single horn dash and will bounce off the opponent on hit.

skills.name: {{ n236 }}{{ C }}
skills.description:
Kabbu tries to grab the opponent.
If it connects, he tosses the opponent up and skewers them on his horn before dropping them to the ground beside him.
Midscreen, you can combo using Chain Cancel. In the corner, you can followup meterlessly with a light normal.

skills.name: Pebble Toss
skills.description:
Kabbu hops up and tosses a pebble in an arc that tracks to the opponent's location.
Not very strong, but can be used as a meaty setup or to harass a projectile-happy opponent since it goes over most projectiles.
You can air dash or air attack before you land from the hop.

skills.name: {{ n214 }}{{ B }}
skills.description:
Kabbu chops downwards. In the air, Kabbu's forward momentum stops and he dives nearly straight down.
The uncharged version is a very fast overhead, but you can't combo meterlessly, it scales as hard as a throw, and is unsafe on block.
The charged version is slower, but you can combo from it with lights (heavies if you counterhit) and it's safe on block.
The air version is good as an instant overhead and scales less harshly than the uncharged grounded version, but there are fewer opportunities to land it raw.
Air version can’t be charged.
In a juggle, all versions Groundslide, allowing combo followups.

skills.name: Under Strike
skills.description:
Kabbu charges forward, digging through the ground before ending with a horn uppercut.
Can go under a lot of physical attacks and has projectile invincibility.
You can hold {{ B }} to travel a longer distance.
It has slow startup and is very unsafe on block, but leads to great damage anywhere on screen.
Used in high-damage counterhit confirms.

exs.name: Dash Through
exs.description: Kabbu charges fullscreen in almost an instant, running straight through the opponent and any projectiles.
